title: Menagesha Suba Forest
html:
Day Trip to Menagesha -Suba Forest

Duration-Full days

Mode of transportation: - Car

Menagesha suba forest

We will meet you at the airport or your hotel then we will drive to  Menagesha    suba   forest   which was   originally     protected    by  Zera Yacob (1399 –1468) he was the Emperor of Ethiopia. the total area of the park is around 2500 hectare and the forest have a natural big trees like juniper us and Eric arboreal and  is one of the tourist destination for a day trip from Addis Ababa because of its remarkable natural indigenous tree species  and some endemic birds with some species mammals like endemic antelopes of Minilk Bushbuck. after the visit return to Addis Ababa.
